title: Rusty Cobblemon
body:
# Rusty Cobblemon

This modpack transforms Minecraft into a Pokémon-inspired adventure by adding Cobblemon, a mod that lets you discover, catch, and train Pokémon-like creatures within the world of Minecraft. On top of Cobblemon, this pack enhances exploration, combat, and survival with a range of carefully selected mods.

## What does this modpack do?

- Adds Cobblemon, allowing you to find, battle, and collect Pokémon-style creatures.
- Expands the world with improved biomes, dungeons, and structures using mods like Terralith, YUNG's Better Structures, and When Dungeons Arise.
- Enhances combat with the Better Combat mod and additional battle animations.
- Improves the user experience with mods like Sophisticated Backpacks for better inventory management and Waystones for fast travel.
- Optimizes performance and graphics with Sodium, Iris shaders, and Dynamic Lights.

## Why should you download this modpack?

- If you love both Minecraft and Pokémon, this pack provides the perfect fusion, offering a fresh way to explore, battle, and survive.
- Whether solo or with friends, features like Trainer Battles, Voice Chat, and global trading systems make the experience immersive and community-friendly.
- It includes multiple quality-of-life improvements, from customizable menus with FancyMenu to a cleaner debug screen with BetterF3, and rich sound design with Presence Footsteps and Sound Physics Remastered.
- The inclusion of Rusty Bottle Caps adds a new layer of strategy, allowing you to customize your Pokémon's IVs to suit specific competitive needs.

## Important information before downloading:

- This modpack requires Minecraft version 1.21.1 and the Fabric mod loader.
- Some mods in the pack may need a mid-to-high-end PC for the best performance, especially with shaders enabled.
- Multiplayer-compatible and ready for both survival playthroughs and Cobblemon-focused adventures.
- Includes mods to improve visuals, UI, and world generation without compromising Cobblemon’s core mechanics.

## Legal Notice:

This modpack includes the "Radical Cobblemon Trainers" mod, originally developed by hd42 (available at https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod).
The mod was modified on 22.02.2025 to increase trainer health to address compatibility issues with other mods in this pack.
In accordance with the LGPL-3.0-or-later license, the source code of the modified version is available upon request or as part of this distribution.
Users are encouraged to support and refer to the original project by hd42.
